snapshot.overwriteConfirm: A snapshot for {{month}} already exists. Overwrite?

cashFlow.title: Where your money goes
cashFlow.subtitlePrefix: Each income stream, expense category, and loan payment is shown separately. Edit data on

netWorth.title: Net worth over time
netWorth.captionPrefix: Forecast ({{years}}y) assumes planned contributions and return scenarios
netWorth.captionSuffix: — not guaranteed. Click a point to see how that month's net worth step is calculated.
netWorth.empty: Save monthly snapshots for history. Add investment buckets with return assumptions to see a forecast.

form.name: Name
form.investableInfo: Update current value when you get a statement. Monthly contribution is your plan (not an expense).

income.title: Income Streams
income.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this income stream?

errors.nameRequired: Please enter an income stream name

expenses.title: Expenses

help.debtTrackedPrefix: Mortgages and other loans are tracked under
help.debtTrackedSuffix: (balance + monthly payment). Their payments are included in totals below automatically — do not add the same payment again as an expense.

expenses.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this expense?

debtPayments.title: Debt payments (from Liabilities)
debtPayments.emptyPrefix: No liability payments configured. Add a mortgage or loan on the

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Record actual income and spending events. These power the actual-vs-planned comparison and insights.
transactions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?

table.title: Transactions
table.empty: No transactions for the selected filters. Add one or import a CSV.

form.plannedExpenseDebtHint: For debt payments, pick a line from Liabilities (monthly payment or special repayment) or a living expense below.
form.plannedDebtEmpty: No liability payment or special repayment is configured. Set them under Liabilities, or pick a living expense above.
form.debtLinkRequired: Link the debt so interest can be separated from principal.

errors.empty: The file appears to be empty or has no header row.
errors.noValidRows: No valid rows to import. Check your column mapping.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Automated, rule-based observations about your finances. Optionally generate a written analysis with a local AI model.
insights.empty: No insights yet. Add assets, liabilities, income, expenses, and transactions to get tailored observations.

ai.title: AI analysis
ai.subtitle: A local language model summarises the metrics above into plain-language analysis. Nothing leaves your machine.
ai.generatingHint: This can take a while on CPU-only setups.
ai.analysisPrompt: Give me a concise overall analysis of my current financial situation: overall position, strengths, risks, and 2-4 concrete suggestions.
ai.disabled: Local AI analysis is disabled. Start the app with the LLM profile (docker compose --profile llm up) to enable it.
ai.unavailable: The local AI model is enabled but not reachable yet. Make sure the Ollama service is running and the model has been pulled.
ai.disclaimer: AI-generated analysis based on your data. Informational only — not financial advice.

processor.gpuTooltip: Model fully on the NVIDIA GPU (Task Manager GPU 1). ~5 GB VRAM in use. During generation, watch the CUDA/Compute graph on GPU 1 — the top-level 0% is normal when idle.
processor.partialTooltip: Only part of the model fits in VRAM; the rest runs on CPU. Lower OLLAMA_NUM_CTX or use a smaller model.
processor.cpuTooltip: Model running on CPU, not the NVIDIA GPU (GPU 1). Check docker-compose GPU settings and NVIDIA Container Toolkit.
processor.idleTooltip: Model not loaded yet — it loads on first request. Intel UHD (GPU 0) activity is normal; LLM work uses NVIDIA GPU 1.

help.introSuffix: (investment or retirement type). Set monthly contribution and return scenarios here — not under Expenses. Update values over time to see how market fluctuations affect your portfolio.

kpi.afterDcaWarning: DCA exceeds surplus — adjust plan or expenses

chart.title: Investable value over time

noBuckets.prefix: No buckets in forecast. Add an investment account with expected return and enable "Include in forecast". Update bucket values on

noHistory.prefix: No recorded history yet. Update bucket values on
noHistory.suffix: to track how your investments move with the market.

chart.captionPrefix: Recorded values reflect updates you enter for investment buckets. Forecast scenarios are illustrative only

payoff.title: Debt Payoff Timeline
payoff.subtitle: Projected balance until each debt is paid off. Compare baseline payments with your saved plan and optional what-if strategies (not saved to the database).

payoffCard.noRemainingBalance: This liability has no remaining balance.
payoffCard.noAsOfMonth: No as-of month set — chart uses the recorded balance as of today.
payoffCard.lumpSumCurrentPlan: Lump sum today (current plan + lump sum)
payoffCard.lumpSumBaseline: Lump sum today (regular payment + lump sum)
payoffCard.baselineMatches: Baseline and current plan match — no special repayments configured or they have no effect on this schedule.

payoffChart.selectScenario: Select at least one scenario to display the payoff chart.
payoffChart.alreadyPaidOff: This liability is already paid off.
payoffChart.warningNotAmortizing: Regular payment does not cover monthly interest — the balance may not decrease on the baseline plan.
payoffChart.warningBeyond50y: Payoff extends beyond 50 years for some scenarios; chart shows the first 600 months.

form.name: Liability Name
form.maxAnnualPrepayHelper: Maximum percentage of principal that can be prepaid annually
form.investAfterPayoff: Invest monthly payment into stocks after this debt is paid off
form.investInfo: The net worth forecast on your Dashboard will show a second line reflecting extra investing once this liability is projected to be paid off.
form.investNoAssets: Add an investment bucket on Assets first

backup.title: Backup & restore
backup.subtitle: Export all your data to a JSON file for safekeeping, or restore from a previous backup.
backup.body: Export all your data to a JSON file for safekeeping, or restore from a previous backup. Data lives in the Docker Postgres volume — export regularly if you reset the database.

export.title: Export
export.description: Downloads assets (including investment buckets and return scenarios), liabilities (special repayments, invest-after-payoff), income, expenses, value history, and monthly snapshots.

import.title: Import
import.description: Replaces all existing data with the contents of a backup file (version 1, 2, or 3 JSON).

backup.confirmImportReplaceAll: This will replace ALL your data with the backup file. Continue?

messages.exportFailed: Export failed. Is the server running?

checkIn.title: Monthly check-in
checkIn.subtitle: Review proposed values, adjust as needed, then confirm. The system suggests amounts based on your last snapshot or current records — you supervise every save.

month.caughtUp: You're caught up through {{month}}. You can re-save this month if your values changed.
month.missingLabel: {{count}} month missing in your snapshot history
month.missingLabel_plural: {{count}} months missing in your snapshot history
month.startEarliest: Start with the earliest gap to keep history consistent.

review.basisCurrent: Proposed from your current asset and liability values.
review.backfillOnly: Backfill only — current asset and liability values will not change for this historical month.
review.noProposal: No proposal loaded. Go back and select a month.

confirm.title: Confirm check-in for {{month}}
confirm.updatesCurrent: This will update your current asset and liability records and save a monthly snapshot.
confirm.historicalOnly: This will save a historical snapshot only. Your current records stay as they are.
